3:
Jacke welcomes you back from your dagger practice with another nugget of wisdom: in combat, a rogue relies more on agility than brute force. Keep the guildmaster's words in mind as you work on preparing yourself for whatever job Jacke means to give you.

※The next rogue quest will be available from Jacke upon reaching level 5.
